name: Marinated Teriyaki Eggplant
description: Sweet, sticky and salty marinated teriyaki aubergine, griddled until charred and served over rice with sesame seeds and spring onion.

steps.title: Whisk the marinade
steps.content: Whisk {0002}, {0003}, {0004}, {0005}, {0006} and {0007} in a bowl, making sure the sugar is dissolved.

steps.title: Coat the aubergine
steps.content: Cut {0001} into small chunks, place in a large bowl and pour the marinade over the top. Stir and make sure it is all coated, then set aside.

steps.title: Marinate
steps.content: Let marinate for at least 20 minutes, stirring a few times.

steps.title: Griddle the aubergine
steps.content: Place a griddle pan on the hob over medium-high heat. Once hot, place the marinated aubergine in. Pour any excess marinade over the top whilst cooking. You may need to do it in two batches — keep the first batch warm on a low heat in the oven.

steps.title: Cook until charred
steps.content: Cook for a few minutes on each side until brown and starting to char from the griddle lines.

steps.title: Serve
steps.content: Serve straight away with {0008}, topped with {0009} and {0010}.

notes:
Mix it up by adding different vegetables or adding tofu for extra protein.

Nutrition per serving (yield 2): 342 kcal, 7g fat (1g saturated), 0mg cholesterol, 3510mg sodium, 56g carbohydrates, 3g fibre, 24g sugar, 10g protein.
